category_sources: Official site https://gauge.org describes Gauge as an open source test automation framework.
source_facts.description says Gauge is a test automation tool that supports executable documentation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gauge; official docs and site brand it as Gauge.
docs_sources: Official dedicated documentation domain linked from Gauge project materials.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/getgauge/gauge, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs cover specifications, plugins, command reference, and configuration.
source_facts.description identifies test automation and executable documentation.
